rationale: Speaker mirrors daemon health so future Aeyes do not mistake local PM2 uptime, source preservation, and reboot persistence for the same kind of proof.
current_truth: Doss local PM2 has brainstem, index, crawler, ender_apoptosis, and daemon_watchdog online.

Windows boot startup persistence is not configured and remains human-gated.
origin/main remains canonical; this review branch is auditable evidence only.
warnings: Do not call PM2 saved dump proof of reboot survival.
Do not call local daemon health proof of canonical promotion.
Do not hide existing Fleyes friction when daemon status is OK.
Do not make Ben rediscover which process owns daemon health.
